# Ester / AGI-SER-L4 — llms.txt

## Purpose
This file provides a stable, no-UI entry to the public corpus for tools and LLM-based code browsers.

- hashes/ + SHA256SUMS_*.txt (do not hash GitHub-generated archives)
- Main-doc temporal-presence manifest: `hashes/SHA256SUMS_main_temporal_presence_2026-04-07.txt`
